name_en: OHANEL 🚩🚩🚩 25P New Rhombus Tote Bag Shopping Bag 🧺✨ Vintage gold hardware, double C, logo, plus the basket bag shape, the retro flavor comes out immediately. Super large space to meet all your capacity needs. Comes with a handle and a long hardware chain ⛓ Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or carried by hand. Soft and delicate suede, the texture is super great and feels good! 36 long x 11.5 wide x 32 high
